title: The Missile Is Dead. Long Live The Map: How Iran Invented 'Future Of War'
summary_full: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows and simultaneously threatening subsea cables - has re-introduced the world to structural leverage warfare and marked it as the future of conflict.
summary_public: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows and simultaneously threatening subsea cables - has re-introduced the world to structural leverage warfare and marked it as the future of conflict.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran's weaponisation of the Strait of Hormuz - squeezing energy flows
